title: Create: Brassless Train Controls
description: Changes Train Controls to have a andesite outline instead of the default Brass/Train casing one
body:
Changes Train Controls to have a andesite outline instead of the default Brass/Train casing one I made this because i wanted it to match some of my trains that don't match the brass. If you have any issues just dm me on discord: Albert_tinkle

![My Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88b080159b47f0dc009b4af3a2b0f37ab55d21ee.png)
